title: plantago major f. scopulorum
intro: Plantago major f. scopulorum, also known as the common plantain or buckhorn plantain, is a variety of the broad-leaved plantain plant that is native to North America. It has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Plantago major f. scopulorum include treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations, as well as reducing swelling and pain. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as salves, creams, and infusions, which can be applied topically to the affected area.
